Title: TH Cards (BBL)
Content:
Xendit Stakeholders

Department

PIC

PIC Role

Sales/ CS

Submitting the request

MO

Kavissara (Praew) ApiratrueangwutKittapat (Pingpong) Srisuphan

Activate channels

Partner PIC

Department

Email Address

BBL Full payment and Installment Team

supasinee.sualar@bangkokbank.com (PIC for Full payment)

Natwarat.Isaranon@bangkokbank.com (PIC for Installment)

Eligibility

Entity Type

Eligible

Sole Proprietorship

✅

Corporation

✅

Non-Local Entities

❌

Partnership

✅

Non-Profit

❌

Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

Account Status

The merchant account must be LIVE and the KYC status must be Passed

MID Setup

Regulation from the Bank of Thailand requires each merchant to have their own MID.

SLA

Entity Origin

SLA

All entity

5 to 7 business days (For MID creation)

Total SLA

2 - 6 weeks as BAU

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Merchant requests via CS/ MO email/ XDT dashboard

Merchant

MID Creation

2

Card Full (One-Time Payment):

  • MO fills out the acquiring bank sheet and emails it to the respective bank partner.

Card Installment:

  • MO fills out the acquiring bank sheet and emails it to the respective bank partner.

Recipients:

  • supasinee.sualar@bangkokbank.com

cc:

  • Natwarat.Isaranon@bangkokbank.com,

  • Jatuporn Kiatpota <Jatuporn.Kiatpota@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Kwanjit Maruttanachai <Kwanjit.Maruttanachai@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Thanakan Uaworakunchai <Thanakan.Uaworakunchai@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Attakorn Chongcharoen <Attakorn.Chongcharoen@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Koravit Chanthavanij <Koravit.Chanthavanij@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Chanoknan Sinchai <Chanoknan.Sinchai@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Thanawan Pitaksorayoot <Thanawan.Pitaksorayoot@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Nisarat Surapat <Nisarat.Surapat@bangkokbank.com>,

  • Peerawas Rittiprasong <peerawas.rittiprasong@xendit.co>,

  • Merchant Ops - TH (GBPrime)" <merchantops.th@xendit.co>,

Submit with .XLSX and Additional Document:

  • Company registration/ DBD/ Company affidavit

  • Authorized director ID card

  • Registration page (Screenshot of XDT dashboard or GB dashboard)

  • Business license (If any)


For more details, can check here: https://xendit.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TH/pages/3882385524/Card+and+MID+creation

MO

MID Configuration and Testing

3.

Once partner provides the MID/ IpayID from BBL, MO prepares the sheet for Engineer team

  • XDT merchant sheet

  • GBP merchant sheet

And Collect MID/ IpayID/ Secure hash details in Gdrive

4.

MO escalate to the engineer team (@hendry.yuwono , @Mathawat (Bas) Watcharapittayapong , @Panida (Nook) Khongchaiman ) via #th-cards-mid-migration

For more details, can check here;

https://xendit.slack.com/archives/C07JYDZ2UQ5/p1770700144953359

Activation Flow (One-Time Payment)

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Once MID is all set, MO can activate the cards channel in retool.

MO

2

Input the Business ID (#1) of the merchant and set Payment Method to CARDS then click Next.

3

a. Check partner and channel GBPRIMEPAY (#1) and click Activate Check Mark (#2) icon

  • Note: Please make sure to only activate the routing rule you want to be activated. Not all routing rules with channel GBPRIMEPAY are expected to be activated!

b. Check whether the routing rules that want to be activated is correct

c. Click Confirm (#3)

d. Scroll right the routing rule list to Status and make sure rule Status set to ACTIVE (#4)

Activation Flow (Installment)

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Once MID is all set, MO can activate the cards channel in retool.

2

Input the Business ID (#1) of the merchant and set Payment Method to CARDS then click Next.

3

a. Check channel BANK CARD INSTALLMENT (#1) and click Activate Check Mark (#2) icon

  • Note: Please make sure to only activate the routing rule you want to be activated. Not all routing rules are expected to be activated!

b. Check whether the routing rules that want to be activated is correct

c. Click Confirm (#3)

d. Scroll right the routing rule list to Status and make sure all Status set to ACTIVE (#4)

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

If a merchant fails onboarding criteria, the MO agent notifies the requester via the original submission channel:

  • CS: Inform the team to relay the result to the merchant.

  • Direct MO: Respond to the existing email thread.

  • Sales/Slack: Reply within the #mo-request or #thailand-pg-activation-request thread.

MO
